name: Uma
description: Uma (우마왕) is a main character, and the King of the Minotaurs. She is the Monkey King's sworn "brother" and an extremely powerful fighter. After her battle with Lee Soo-Jin, Uma had lost her physical body, but became apart of Baek Seung-Chul as his charyeok.

name: Vijay Singh
nativeName: ヴィジャイ・クマール・シング
description: __Height:__ 185 cm __X-Playing Card:__ Green Green (♣ 3) Vijay Kumar Singh is a member of High Card. He has a calm personality, loves plants, and is a great chef. Though he is an intelligent man that can complete any task flawlessly, his rationality prevents him from being able to “read the room,” so the others think of him as a bit of an “airhead.” He is a part-time lecturer and a Ph.D. student at the University of Cribbage. name: Vira Lillie
description: Vira is the Lord Commander of the Albion Citadel. A little obsessed with Katalilna, and considers her as her big sister. She won against her in a duel years prior and has been the Lord Commander ever since.

name: Vivi Ornitier
description: Vivi Ornitier, occasionally stylized as VIVI, or with the surname Orunitia, is a playable character in Final Fantasy IX. He is a black mage, differentiated from humans by having a black aura surrounding his visible outer skin, glowing yellow eyes, and the ability to cast magic.

name: Vivlos
description: **Height:** 156cm Vivlos is a devilishly cute young lady. She's the youngest of three sisters, and has been a spoiled brat since she was a child, because of her family's wealth. She has been fascinated by Dubai since she went there on vacation, and longed to live a celebrity life in a luxurious country. Her goal is to run a race in Dubai, using her natural talent and great sense of timing as her weapons.

name: Wataru Kaidou
description: The protagonist of Kurayami Dance. Wataru works as an undertaker at the Hadou Crematorium and a biker off work. After getting into an accident caused by his desire to reach 300 km/h, he falls into a coma. He wakes up three years later - in an transformed hometown, with a transplanted eye, and a strange talking hallucination looming over him. Wataru is a tall, slender man. His black hair is cut short. name: Xemnas
description: Xemnas (ゼムナス, Zemunasu?) is the Nobody of Xehanort, his name an anagram of his other self's alias of "Ansem". He is the leader of the Organization and the main antagonist of Kingdom Hearts II. Xemnas is voiced by Norio Wakamoto in the Japanese version of Kingdom Hearts II, and by Paul St. Peter in the English version. description: ~!Gender: Female!~ The third heir within the Bauer Kingdom's royal family. A charismatic and attractive prince type who uses charm to mask a cunning mind. description: A rising star actress. Her behavior and way of speaking are rough, giving the impression of a disappointing girl. When participating in e-sport tournaments, she hides her true identity behind a mask. (Source: Official Site, translated)

name: Zorua
description: Zorua is a slate gray, fox-like Pokémon with red and black accents. Its ears are triangular with dark insides, and it has a large tuft of fur tipped with red on top of its head. It has greenish blue eyes with red eyelids. There are circular, red markings above the eyes that resemble eyebrows. Its muzzle is short and tapered with two small fangs seen in the upper jaw when its mouth is open. Zorua possesses a ruff of black fur around its neck and four short limbs tipped with red. name: Ike
description: Ike is the central character of Fire Emblem: Path of Radiance and one of the main characters in Fire Emblem: Radiant Dawn. He is the son of Greil and Elena, as well as the older brother of Mist. He is also the fearless leader of the Greil Mercenaries and the first and only main character who is not of noble birth. name: Kaga
description: A calm and no-nonsense bow-wielding shipgirl based on the real-life Japanese aircraft carrier Kaga. Sister ship to [Akagi](https://anilist.co/character/174622/Akagi). In the *Shimakaze Tsumujikaze no Shoujo* manga, she's given a considerably darker characterization than in the first anime and *Fubuki, Ganbarimasu* 4koma, as she states her siblings "never got a chance to be born" and deems her very existence a mistake. However, she ends up bonding with Shimakaze over their mutual feelings.
